summary: TarjousDialog email integration fully tested and working. All features verified: manual mode, price rows, kokonaishinta mode, and email sending via Resend API.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (<tr> inside <span>, <span> inside <tbody>) - React hydration warning from dynamic table rows. Non-blocking but should be fixed for cleaner code.
Console warnings about missing DialogTitle/Description accessibility attributes (Radix UI warning)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix HTML nesting warning in TarjousDialog.js - the table rows are wrapped in <span> elements which causes React hydration warnings
test_credentials: None required - Resend API key already configured in backend/.env
context_for_next_testing_agent: TarjousDialog email integration is fully working. Resend API is configured and sending emails successfully.

tests: Dialog opens from Tarjous dropdown menu
Customer info fields work (asiakas, kohde, email, yhteyshenkilö, puhelin)
Urakan sisältö textarea accepts multi-line text
Price rows table with auto-calculation (määrä × yksikköhinta = yhteensä)
Kokonaishinta toggle switches to single price input
Lähetä tarjous button enabled when email is filled
Email sent successfully with price rows (1,500 €)
POST with valid data returns 200 and email_id
Finnish characters (ä, ö, å) handled correctly

frontend.test: Lähetä tarjous button enabled with email
Email send with price rows - success toast
Email send with kokonaishinta - success toast

GET /api/presets/offer-terms.response: Returns array of 11 Finnish offer terms

GET /api/presets/tools.response: Returns tool presets for line, wall, rectangle, polygon, count

rca_of_issue: No issues found - all features working correctly
